DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Y. Parnall, Esq., (415-759-8755), for Eleonor Sabalvaro and Lorna Wong, Cross Defendants and Plaintiffs/moving parties.
No other appearance.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANTS ELEONOR SABALVARO and LORNA WONG's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED. Demurrer to the first cause of action for promissory estoppel is sustained with leave to amend to allege a clear and unambiguous promise. Demurrer to the second cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege an enforceable contract. See Statute of Frauds, Estate of Housley 56 Cal.App.4th 342. Demurrer to the Third cause of action for interference with prospective economic advantage is sustained with leave to amend to allege a type of business relationship that gives rise to this cause of action. See 5 Witkin Summary of CA Law Ch. IX, 741.

Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
